title: Senior Radiologist at CMC Vellore Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at CMC Vellore Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? CMC Vellore Capital India in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CMC Vellore Capital India:
CMC Vellore Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore Capital India!
